things.name: Altstadt (Old Town)
things.description: Charming medieval old town on both sides of the Limmat river with guildhalls, boutiques and Grossmunster

things.name: Grossmunster Cathedral
things.description: Zurich's iconic Romanesque twin-tower cathedral where Zwingli sparked the Swiss Reformation in 1519

things.name: Kunsthaus Zurich
things.description: Switzerland's most important art museum with Monet, Munch, Giacometti and the largest Munch collection outside Norway

things.name: Lake Zurich Boat Trip
things.description: Paddle steamer cruises on Switzerland's most beautiful lake with views of the Alps on clear days

things.name: Bahnhofstrasse Shopping
things.description: One of the world's most exclusive shopping streets — luxury watches, chocolate and Swiss banking

things.name: Swiss National Museum
things.description: Switzerland's largest cultural history museum in a fairy-tale castle-like building next to the main station

things.name: Uetliberg Mountain
things.description: Zurich's local mountain at 871m — S-Bahn direct, panoramic views of the Alps and lake from the tower

things.name: Zurich West & Langstrasse
things.description: Zurich's former industrial quarter transformed into galleries, design studios and the city's best nightlife

things.name: Lindt Home of Chocolate
things.description: Stunning chocolate museum with the world's tallest chocolate fountain in Kilchberg on Lake Zurich

things.name: Rhine Falls Day Trip
things.description: Europe's largest waterfall at Schaffhausen — take a boat to the rock in the middle of the falls
